nodes.label: A program: call <import thunk>; the thunk is at an address we hook.      code
A return_const hook on A whose simulate_ret always returns to A (stack full of A
simulate_ret raises UcError when RSP is unmapped; must surface as ERROR,     no
Budget overflow must be caught before touching the emulator.
A fetch fault at SENTINEL_ADDR+1 (same page, different address) must be     ERR
skip simulates ret without modifying RAX; a regression setting RAX=0     on ski
The mem_writes side-effect of return_const must actually write to the     targe
MS convention passes first arg in RCX, not RDI (SysV).
# NOTE: code page is NOT pre-mapped; the unmapped hook must fetch it.
